name: Indus: CAS Bigram Phoneme Projection — P122→P385 Genitive Reading
description: Uses CPSC CASProjector with the indus_bigram_phoneme CAS model to project optimal phoneme ranks for the dominant CISI bigram P122→P385 (n=29, 83% of P385 occurrences). DoF values represent the normalized Dravidian phoneme frequency ranks: p122_rank=0.82 (high-frequency medial phoneme like 'a'/'ka'), p385_rank=0.88 (high-frequency terminal phoneme like genitive -n/in). The CPSC IterativeEngine projects these onto the Dravidian morphological constraint manifold and reports the combined_confidence score. If combined_confidence >= 0.70, the P122→P385 = STEM+genitive reading is linguistically confirmed by the constraint system.
